feed.title: Dart Refactoring Pro
feed.subtitle: A Dart refactoring tool using a Code Property Graph (CPG) built on package:analyzer. Runs as a background server and integrates with the IntelliJ IDE via a dedicated plugin.

entry.title: Changelog
entry.summary: All notable changes to Dart Refactoring Pro will be documented in this file. The format is based on Keep a Changelog. [2026.0.1+alpha.8] - Unreleased Changed Detect the current directory in Move Top-Level Declaration Imports for all refactorings are now sorted Fixed Undo behaviour for Move Top-Level Declaration [2026.0.1+alpha.7] - 2026-04-02 Added Support to moving multiple ...
